name: Aniel – Teaching a cool ass game
description:
Placeholder image right now, I'm jumping on this ASAP. Anyways, Aniel be smort. So she's taken it upon herself to teach you Flockade, and maybe gets a little impatient.

This is gonna be before anyone gets deaded. The bot would 100% forget that they're a ghost anyways. Same with the entirety of Flockade honestly

Unrelated note I had so much fun playing Flockade, it's a cool concept and River Boy's niece made music for it, respect.
creator: Showman682
